# OfficeFlow Supply Co. - Shipping & Delivery Policy

## SHIPPING METHODS

**Standard Shipping** takes 3-5 Business Days and costs $8.95 flat rate. There is a free shipping threshold that applies to this method. For orders that meet the minimum, shipping is completely free. The threshold is $100 or more in merchandise value before tax.

**Expedited Shipping** takes 2-3 Business Days and costs $15.95 flat rate. Orders must be placed by 2:00 PM EST for same-day processing, otherwise they ship the next business day. Free shipping is available on this method for orders $250 or more.

**Express Shipping** delivers in 1-2 Business Days and costs $24.95 flat rate. Order by 2:00 PM EST for same-day processing is required. Signature required upon delivery for verification purposes. Available Monday-Thursday only because Friday orders would deliver on weekends which we don't support.

**Overnight Shipping** provides Next Business Day delivery at $39.95 flat rate. The cutoff time is different for this method. You must order by 12:00 PM EST, not 2:00 PM. Available Monday-Thursday only due to weekend delivery limitations. Signature is required.

**Business Account** customers can access custom shipping rates if they are high-volume customers. Dedicated delivery routes are available in major metro areas. Contact your account manager for more information.

## PROCESSING INFORMATION

Orders received before 2:00 PM EST ship same business day. After 2:00 PM they ship next day. Standard items take 1 business day to process. Special orders may require additional time ranging from 1-2 weeks depending on the item.

## DELIVERY COVERAGE

**United States:** All 50 states are covered including Alaska and Hawaii. APO/FPO addresses are accepted but only with standard shipping methods. PO Boxes are accepted for most items, but some restrictions apply to large or hazardous items.

**Canada:** All provinces and territories can receive shipments. However, duties and taxes may apply when the shipment crosses the border. Additional 1-2 days should be expected for customs clearance processing time.

**International** orders outside US/Canada are available on request for large orders only. Contact sales@officeflow.com for a quote. The customer is responsible for all duties, taxes, and customs fees.

## TRACKING ORDERS

Tracking number is emailed when order ships. Check status at www.officeflow.com/track for real-time updates. Multiple packages may have separate tracking numbers if your order is large. For tracking issues contact fulfillment@officeflow.com or 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 5.

## DELIVERY TYPES

**Residential Delivery:** Left at door if no signature required. Safe location notes can be added. Carrier may require signature for high-value orders over a certain threshold. **Business Delivery:** Delivered to reception during business hours. Can specify receiving department. Dock delivery available for large orders upon request.

**Hold for Pickup:** Available at carrier facilities. Request during checkout or contact fulfillment team. This is a free service with no additional charges.

## COMMON ISSUES

**Damaged Shipments:** Inspect package upon delivery and note damage on receipt if possible. Photograph damage before opening the box. Contact us within 48 hours at fulfillment@officeflow.com and we'll arrange replacement or refund immediately without requiring the damaged item to be returned first.

**Lost Packages:** Contact us if tracking shows delivered but you didn't receive it. We'll file a carrier claim and send a replacement. The claim process typically takes 3-5 business days to complete with the carrier.

**Wrong Items:** Contact us immediately at fulfillment@officeflow.com with your order number. Provide item details about what you received versus what you ordered. Replacement shipped same or next business day and we'll provide a return label if you received the wrong item.

## SHIPPING RESTRICTIONS

Due to regulations, some items have restrictions that apply. Hazardous materials like certain markers and adhesives must ship via ground shipping only, no air transport allowed. Oversized items such as furniture require freight shipping with special handling. Heavy items over 50 pounds may incur freight charges. International shipments cannot include aerosols or flammables due to customs regulations.

## ADDRESS CHANGES

**Before Shipment:** Contact sales team immediately. Address can be updated at no charge if caught within 2 hours of order placement. After that window, changes become more difficult.

**After Shipment:** Contact fulfillment team with tracking number. May be able to reroute with carrier but a $10-15 fee will apply. Success depends on current location in the shipping network. Cannot change once the package is out for delivery.

For questions about shipping, contact the Fulfillment Team at fulfillment@officeflow.com (preferred method) or phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 5. Hours are Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST. Track orders anytime at www.officeflow.com/track which is available 24/7.

# OfficeFlow Supply Co. - Returns & Refunds Policy

## RETURN ELIGIBILITY

Items may be returned within **60 days of delivery**. We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. All returns require an RMA number before shipping. Unopened products in original packaging are eligible for return as well as defective items. However, opened paper reams cannot be returned due to hygiene standards, and custom-printed items are also ineligible. Products marked as Final Sale cannot be returned under any circumstances, and items without packaging are not accepted.

**IMPORTANT EXCEPTION:** Defective or damaged items can be returned at any time, even after the 30-day window has passed. Items shipped in error are also always eligible.

## RETURN PROCESS STEPS

Contact our Returns Department first. You must provide your order number and explain why you're returning the item. They will then issue you a number that you'll need. This number is called a **Return Merchandise Authorization** or **RMA**. It's required for all returns without exception. The RMA is valid for 14 days from issue.

When shipping items back, the RMA number must be clearly marked on the outside of the package. Use original packaging when possible and include your packing slip. We recommend using insured shipping with tracking for your protection.

**Contact information:** returns@officeflow.com or phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3. Response time is within 4 business hours during business days.

## REFUND PROCESSING

Refunds are processed within **5-7 business days**. The original payment method will be credited. Important note: shipping charges are non-refundable unless the return is due to our error or the item is defective. Return shipping costs are the customer's responsibility in most cases unless the item was defective or we shipped the wrong item.

## DEFECTIVE ITEMS

If you receive a defective or damaged item, contact us immediately. Within 48 hours of delivery is preferred but not required. Provide photos of the damage if possible so we can document the issue. We will arrange for pickup or send you a prepaid return label at no cost. Replacement items are shipped immediately upon confirmation of the defect. You will not be charged for return shipping on defective items.

## EXCHANGES

We're happy to exchange items. The same process as returns applies - you need an RMA. Price differences may apply if exchanging for a different item. Exchange items are shipped once we receive and inspect the return.

## BUSINESS ACCOUNTS

Business customers may have customized return policies. These are based on their specific agreement with OfficeFlow. Contact your dedicated account manager for details about your return policy.

For questions, contact our Returns Department. Email returns@officeflow.com (preferred for detailed requests) or phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3. Hours are Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST.

# OfficeFlow Supply Co. - Ordering & Payment Policy

## HOW TO ORDER

OfficeFlow offers multiple ordering methods for your convenience. **Online Web Portal** is the recommended method and is available 24/7. You can access it at www.officeflow.com and it provides real-time inventory visibility, order history, tracking, saved shopping lists, favorites, and digital invoices.

**Phone Orders** can be placed through our Sales Team. Call 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2 for assistance. Hours are Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 7:00 PM EST. Saturday hours are 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM EST only. We are closed on Sundays and during major holidays.

**Email Orders** are accepted at sales@officeflow.com and should include item numbers or descriptions, quantities desired, and delivery address. During business hours we respond within 2 business hours to all email orders.

**Account Manager** service is available for Business Accounts. This provides dedicated support if you are a high-volume customer. Custom pricing and payment terms are available through this channel. Contact accounts@officeflow.com to set up an account manager relationship.

## MINIMUM ORDERS

There is a minimum order value that applies to most customers. This minimum is **$50 before tax and shipping** are calculated. However, customers with established business accounts do not have any minimum order requirements. Bulk pricing is available on many items if you need large quantities - contact sales for quotes.

## PAYMENT METHODS ACCEPTED

**Credit and Debit Cards:** We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover. All cards are processed securely through our encrypted checkout system. Cards are charged when your order ships, not when you place the order.

**Business Accounts:** Payment terms are available for qualified businesses. Net 30 payment terms require credit approval first. Some qualified accounts can get Net 60 terms if they meet certain criteria. Monthly statements are emailed by the 5th of each month to the billing contact. Early payment discounts are available - ask your account manager about these opportunities.

**Purchase Orders:** These are accepted from established business accounts only. Every order must include a PO number and you must reference this PO number for any related inquiries or issues.

**Other Methods:** Check or money order can be mailed to our payment processing center. The address is OfficeFlow Supply Co., PO Box 4321, Portland, OR 97208. Wire transfer is available for large orders - contact accounting@officeflow.com for wire transfer details and instructions.

## PRICING INFORMATION

Current pricing is displayed on our web portal and can be provided by the sales team when you call. Bulk discounts are available for larger orders. Typically this means 10 or more units of the same item. Contract pricing is available for regular high-volume customers who order frequently. Quote requests should be sent to sales@officeflow.com or you can call the sales team directly. All quotes are valid for 30 days from the date of issue.

## ORDER CONFIRMATIONS

An email confirmation is sent immediately upon order placement to the email address on file. This confirmation includes your order number, the items ordered, quantities, and estimated delivery date. If you need any changes, contact us within 2 hours of placing the order. After processing begins, cancellations may incur restocking fees.

## MODIFICATIONS AND CANCELLATIONS

**Before Processing:** If you contact us within 2 hours of ordering, full modifications and cancellations are available with no fees or penalties. Contact the sales team immediately if you need to make changes.

**After Processing:** Once processing has started, cancellation may incur a 15% restocking fee on the order total. Modifications are limited to delivery address changes only after processing begins. Custom or special-order items cannot be cancelled under any circumstances once processing has started.

## BACKORDER POLICY

If an item is temporarily out of stock when you order it, we will notify you of the expected availability date. You can choose to wait for the item to come back in stock or substitute with a similar product that we have available. You can cancel backorders anytime without any penalty. You are not charged until the backordered item actually ships to you.

## SPECIAL ORDERS

Custom quantities and special requests are welcome at OfficeFlow. Typical lead time for special orders is 1-2 weeks from approval. Minimum quantities may apply depending on the item and supplier. A non-refundable deposit may be required for some special orders. Contact sales@officeflow.com with your specific requirements.

## BUSINESS ACCOUNT BENEFITS

Setting up a business account provides several benefits including Net 30 or Net 60 payment terms, no minimum order requirements, a dedicated account manager for your company, custom pricing for regular orders, consolidated monthly billing statements, and purchase order processing.

To apply for a business account, complete the online application at www.officeflow.com/business or email accounts@officeflow.com for assistance. You will need to provide your business name, tax ID, and trade references. A credit check is required but it's a soft inquiry that won't affect your credit score. Approval typically takes 1-2 business days.

## CONTACT INFORMATION

**Sales Team:** Email sales@officeflow.com or phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2. Available Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 7:00 PM EST.

**Account Questions:** Email accounts@officeflow.com or phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 4 for billing, payment terms, and account setup issues.

# OfficeFlow Supply Co. - Company Information

## COMPANY HISTORY AND BACKGROUND

OfficeFlow Supply Co. was established in **1998** and has been operating for over 25 years. We have been a trusted partner for small-to-medium businesses. Our coverage area includes all of North America. We focus on paper products and office supplies distribution. Our core strengths are reliability, quality, and exceptional customer service that sets us apart from competitors.

## FACILITIES AND LOCATIONS

Our headquarters is located in **Portland, Oregon**. We also operate multiple distribution centers to serve our customers efficiently. These centers are strategically positioned in Atlanta and Toronto. This network allows us to serve customers throughout both the United States and Canada. Fast and efficient delivery is possible because of this strategic positioning.

## MISSION STATEMENT

We empower businesses to focus on what they do best. We do this by providing reliable, high-quality office supplies. Exceptional service is at the core of everything we do. Every interaction is an opportunity to build trust. We view customer relationships as partnerships, not transactions.

## CORE VALUES

**Customer First** means your success is our priority in all decisions. **Quality Matters** because we stand behind every product we sell to customers. **Sustainability** represents our commitment to eco-friendly practices and products that help the environment. **Reliability** means consistent service you can count on day after day. **Innovation** drives us to always seek better ways to serve you and improve our operations.

## COMPANY SIZE AND REACH

We currently employ over **150 employees**. These employees are dedicated to serving our customers across multiple departments. We process over **50,000 orders per year** which demonstrates our scale. Our customer base includes more than **3,000 active business customers**. These customers trust us for their office supply needs on an ongoing basis.

## AWARDS AND RECOGNITION

In 2023 we received the **Green Business Award**. This was for Sustainable Practices in our operations and product selection. In 2022 we were named **Best Office Supplies Distributor**. This recognition came from SMB Magazine in their annual awards. We have maintained an **A+ Rating with the Better Business Bureau**. This rating has been consistent since 2010 which shows our commitment to customer satisfaction.

# OfficeFlow Supply Co. - Locations & Contact Information

## DISTRIBUTION CENTER REFERENCE CODES

For internal routing and logistics, each distribution center has a unique facility code. These codes are used across all our systems for inventory management, shipping, and customer service inquiries.

Facility Code Reference: LOC-7842 is headquarters. LOC-9471 handles southeast region. LOC-2089 manages Canadian operations.

## FACILITY ADDRESSES

LOC-7842 is located at 1234 Commerce Way, Portland, OR 97220. This facility handles West Coast operations and corporate functions.

LOC-9471 is located at 9012 Distribution Drive, Norcross, GA 30071. This facility serves the southeastern United States.

LOC-2089 is located at 3456 Logistics Boulevard, Mississauga, ON L5T 2K7. This facility handles cross-border logistics.

## WILL CALL PICKUP SERVICE

You can save on shipping by picking up orders at any distribution center. Order online or by phone first. Select Will Call Pickup at checkout. You'll receive notification when ready, typically 2-4 hours after ordering. Bring order confirmation and photo ID when picking up. Available during distribution center hours only. Free service with no pickup fees.

## DEPARTMENT CONTACTS

**Customer Service** handles general inquiries, product questions, and account assistance. Email is support@officeflow.com. Phone is 1-800-OFFICE-1 main number or ext. 1. Hours Monday-Friday, 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM EST. Saturday 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM EST.

**Sales Team** processes new orders, product quotes, and bulk pricing. Email sales@officeflow.com. Phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 2. Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 7:00 PM EST. Saturday 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM EST.

**Returns Department** handles returns, refunds, damaged items, and exchanges. Email returns@officeflow.com. Phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 3. Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST. Response time is within 4 business hours.

**Accounts and Billing** manages business account setup, billing questions, payment issues, and account changes. Email accounts@officeflow.com. Phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 4. Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST.

**Fulfillment and Shipping** department helps with order status, tracking, delivery issues, and shipping questions. Email fulfillment@officeflow.com. Phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 5. Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST.

**Technical Support** for website issues can be reached at support@officeflow.com or phone 1-800-OFFICE-1 ext. 6. Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM EST. This team handles website problems, login issues, and technical difficulties with the web portal.

**Corporate and Partnerships** handles partnership inquiries, corporate accounts, and vendor applications. Email corporate@officeflow.com. Phone (503) 555-0150. Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM PST.

## FACILITY OPERATING HOURS

All distribution centers operate Monday-Friday only. Weekend operations are not available at any location.

LOC-7842 hours: 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM PST. LOC-9471 hours: 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST. LOC-2089 hours: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM EST.

## FACILITY SERVICES

Will Call pickup is available at all locations. LOC-7842 also provides customer service and sales support on-site. LOC-9471 has a regional sales office. LOC-2089 specializes in customs documentation assistance.

## FACILITY PHONE DIRECTORY

All locations can be reached via the main line 1-800-OFFICE-1. For direct local calls to specific facilities, use the numbers below.

LOC-7842 direct: (503) 555-0100. LOC-9471 direct: (770) 555-0300. LOC-2089 direct: (905) 555-0400.

## BUSINESS HOURS SUMMARY

**Main Phone Line** operates Monday-Friday: 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM EST. Saturday: 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM EST. Sunday: Closed.

**Distribution Centers** are open Monday-Friday: 7:00 AM - 6:00 PM local time. Saturday-Sunday: Closed, which means no Will Call pickup on weekends.

**Web Portal** is available 24/7 for orders and account management. Access it at www.officeflow.com anytime.

## HOLIDAY CLOSURES

We are closed on New Year's Day, Memorial Day, Independence Day which is July 4th, Labor Day, Thanksgiving Day, and Christmas Day.

Limited operations on Day before Thanksgiving until 2:00 PM EST only. Christmas Eve until 2:00 PM EST. New Year's Eve until 2:00 PM EST.

Holiday hours are posted on website and voicemail message 2 weeks in advance of the holiday.

## EMERGENCY CONTACT

For urgent issues outside business hours affecting active orders, email urgent@officeflow.com. Response time is within 2 hours. This is for truly urgent matters only such as delivery emergencies or critical order issues. Non-urgent inquiries will be responded to during next business day.

## MAILING ADDRESSES

**Corporate Office** mail should be sent to OfficeFlow Supply Co., 1234 Commerce Way, Portland, OR 97220.

**Payment Remittance** including checks should go to OfficeFlow Supply Co., PO Box 4321, Portland, OR 97208.

**Returns** must include RMA number. Contact Returns Department for the correct address based on your location as return addresses vary.

## ONLINE PRESENCE

Website is www.officeflow.com. General email is info@officeflow.com. LinkedIn is /company/officeflow-supply. Twitter is @OfficeFlowSupply. Facebook is /OfficeFlowSupply.

## AFTER-HOURS ASSISTANCE

Our team is not available 24/7 but you can place orders anytime at www.officeflow.com. Check order status and tracking online. Access FAQs and help articles at www.officeflow.com/help. Email any department for next-business-day response. Leave voicemail for callback during business hours.

## LANGUAGE SUPPORT

English and Spanish support available for US customers. French support available for Canadian customers. Request language assistance when calling or add it to your order notes.

## ACCESSIBILITY SERVICES

TTY/TDD service available at 1-800-555-0199 for hearing impaired customers. Large print invoices and statements available upon request. For accessibility support email accessibility@officeflow.com.
